name_en: 【Original Leather】🌈 Premium Exclusive🔥 Matte Brown Leather / Antique Gold
name_cn:
【Original Leather】🌈 Premium Exclusive🔥 Matte Brown Leather / Antique Gold
▪ROSE▪️ Autumn/Winter New Arrival, a Korean star's same style Hobo!! This year's exploding underarm bag, Y's arrival is not late!! The bag body has a simple, three-dimensional outline, looking structured but not too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, the overall look gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish 👍
Model: 713938【Original Leather】
Size: 23x22x8cm
